eventHero.title: European Advanced Materials Congress 2025
eventHero.tagline: "Next-Generation Energy Materials for a Sustainable Future" — Join the premier international forum bridging cutting-edge research with practical net-zero applications.

eventIntro.title: Decade of Excellence
paragraphs: Join us in celebrating the 8th Anniversary of the prestigious European Advanced Energy Materials Congress (EAEMC), organized by the International Association of Advanced Materials (IAAM).

EAEMC has consistently served as a leading international platform bringing together researchers, industry professionals, policymakers, and academics to discuss groundbreaking research and innovations in advanced energy materials.

eventSymposia.title: Conference Symposia
eventSymposia.description: Focused scientific tracks exploring the frontier of energy science and materials engineering.

symposia.title: Renewable Energy
symposia.description: Focusing on sustainable materials and system efficiency for a circular energy economy.

symposia.title: Energy Storage
symposia.description: Advanced batteries, supercapacitors, and next-gen lithium-ion technologies.

symposia.title: Photovoltaics
symposia.description: Solar cells, thin films, and light-harvesting semiconductor innovations.

symposia.title: Energy Harvesting
symposia.description: Thermoelectrics, piezoelectrics, and micro-power conversion systems.

symposia.title: Hydrogen Tech
symposia.description: Fuel cells, hydrogen production, storage, and transport infrastructure.

symposia.title: Smart Materials
symposia.description: Intelligent materials designed for building efficiency and responsive systems.

eventDeadlines.title: Critical Deadlines
eventDeadlines.description: Mark your calendars for key submission and registration dates.

deadlines.label: EARLY-BIRD
deadlines.description: Save on registration fees with early-bird rates.

deadlines.label: ABSTRACTS
deadlines.description: Final deadline for technical abstract submissions.

deadlines.label: REGISTRATION
deadlines.description: Standard registration closes for delegates.

deadlines.label: FULL PAPERS
deadlines.description: Submission for Scopus indexed congress journals.

eventHighlights.title: Conference Highlights
eventHighlights.description: Reliving a decade of scientific advancement.

eventSDGs.title: UNSDGs Commitments
eventSDGs.description: EAEMC 2026 is strictly aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals, ensuring our research has direct global impact.

goals.title: Clean Energy
goals.description: Promoting cutting-edge sustainable energy solutions and infrastructure.

goals.title: Climate Action
goals.description: Advancing materials technologies to actively combat global climate change.

goals.title: Innovation
goals.description: Encouraging innovation and sustainable industrial growth in energy materials.

goals.title: Partnerships
goals.description: Fostering global interdisciplinary collaboration and academic partnerships.

eventPublications.title: Indexed Publications
eventPublications.description: Disseminating groundbreaking research through globally recognized and indexed academic channels.

publications.title: Congress Proceedings
publications.description: All accepted abstracts and papers are published with ISBN and DOI indexing, and submitted for Scopus evaluation.

publications.title: Advanced Materials Letters
publications.description: The official open-access journal of IAAM, providing a high-impact platform with no subscription fees for researchers.

publications.title: Video Proceedings
publications.description: An innovative open-access video journal dedicated to documented lectures and visual scientific presentations.
